SEARCH
Package javalibs

Class DBUtils

java.lang.Object
javalibs.DBUtils
@Deprecated public class DBUtils extends Object
Deprecated.
This class is being phased out. Use the focused replacements instead:
  • DBConnection — connect / disconnect
  • DBQuery — select / selectAll / closeResultSet
  • DBUpdate — insert / delete / execute / insertAll / deleteAll
All methods here delegate to those classes. Existing callers continue to work without changes — migrate at your own pace.
Database utility functions.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    closeResultSet(ResultSet rs)
    Deprecated.
    Use DBQuery.closeResultSet(java.sql.ResultSet)
    Connection
    connect(String db, String dbURL, String dbDriverClassName, boolean enforceForeignKeys)
    Deprecated.
    Use DBConnection.connect(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, boolean)
    void
    delete(String db, String dbURL, String dbDriverClassName, String SQLStatement, boolean enforceForeignKeys)
    Deprecated.
    Use DBUpdate.delete(String, String, String, String, boolean)
    void
    delete(Connection conn, String SQLStatement)
    Deprecated.
    Use DBUpdate.delete(Connection, String)
    void
    deleteAll(String db, String dbURL, String dbDriverClassName, List<String> SQLStatements, boolean enforceForeignKeys)
    Deprecated.
    Use DBUpdate.deleteAll(String, String, String, List, boolean)
    void
    deleteAll(Connection conn, List<String> SQLStatements)
    Deprecated.
    Use DBUpdate.deleteAll(Connection, List)
    void
    disconnect(Connection conn)
    Deprecated.
    Use DBConnection.disconnect(java.sql.Connection)
    void
    execute(Connection conn, String SQLStatement)
    Deprecated.
    Use DBUpdate.execute(java.sql.Connection, java.lang.String)

    Deprecated.
    Use DBConnection, DBQuery, or DBUpdate

    Deprecated.
    Use DBUpdate.insert(Connection, String)
    void

    Deprecated.

    insertAll(Connection conn, List<String> SQLStatements)
    Deprecated.
    Use DBUpdate.insertAll(Connection, List)
    ResultSet
    select(Connection conn, String SQLStatement)
    Deprecated.
    Use DBQuery.select(java.sql.Connection, java.lang.String)
    List<ResultSet>
    selectAll(Connection conn, List<String> SQLStatements)
    Deprecated.
    Use DBQuery.selectAll(java.sql.Connection, java.util.List<java.lang.String>)
